name: job-portal-server
description: Job Portal REST API — Express + Sequelize + PostgreSQL

scripts.db:migrate: sequelize db:migrate --config src/config/sequelize.cjs --migrations-path src/migrations --models-path src/models --seeders-path src/seeders
scripts.db:migrate:undo: sequelize db:migrate:undo --config src/config/sequelize.cjs --migrations-path src/migrations --models-path src/models --seeders-path src/seeders
scripts.db:seed: sequelize db:seed:all --config src/config/sequelize.cjs --migrations-path src/migrations --models-path src/models --seeders-path src/seeders
scripts.db:reset: npm run db:migrate:undo && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
